Bash(cd "/Users/musa24/Desktop/Learning_latest/deepLearning/claude code/starting-ragchatbot-codebase-main" && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add CourseOutlineTool, clickable source chips, and new-chat button

Backend:
- Add CourseOutlineTool \(get_course_outline\) so Claude can return a full
  lesson list without doing a semantic search; register it in RAGSystem
- Add VectorStore.get_course_outline\(\) to fetch title, course link, and
  lessons_json from the course_catalog collection
- Return sources as {label, url} objects instead of plain strings; reset
  last_sources at the start of each CourseSearchTool.execute\(\) call to
  prevent stale source leakage between queries
- Add DELETE /api/session/{session_id} endpoint to clear history on demand
- Harden ai_generator: raise ValueError when Claude requests a tool but no
  tool_manager is provided; update system-prompt tool-usage instructions
- Switch to DevStaticFiles for hot-reload-friendly static file serving

Frontend:
- Render sources as styled pill chips; link chips open lesson URLs in a new
  tab, while chips without a URL are displayed as inert spans
- Add "+ New Chat" button that clears the current session on the server and
  starts a fresh session
- Add CSS for .source-chip, a.source-chip, and .new-chat-btn

Tests:
- Add backend/tests/ with initial test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
